features.description: Optionally generate claims and evidence rows for downstream origin compliance tests.
features.title: Downstream origin claim and evidence opt-in

features.description: Populate tests[].execution metadata for generated downstream origin conformance tests.
features.title: Downstream origin execution metadata

features.description: Discover synchronized ssot-origin ADR and SPEC obligations in a downstream repository.
features.title: Downstream origin obligation discovery

features.description: Generate feature and test rows for selected downstream ssot-origin obligations.
features.title: Downstream origin row generation

features.description: Create physical downstream test files for selected ssot-origin ADR and SPEC compliance obligations.
features.title: Downstream origin test file generation

features.description: Track generated downstream tests for ssot-origin ADR compliance obligations.
features.title: Origin ADR compliance tests

features.description: Emit machine-readable evidence from generated downstream origin compliance test runs.
features.title: Origin compliance evidence output

features.description: Summarize per-ADR and per-SPEC compliance status for downstream repositories.
features.title: Origin compliance report

features.description: Track generated downstream tests for ssot-origin SPEC compliance obligations.
features.title: Origin SPEC compliance tests

features.description: Catalog governed test templates mapped to ssot-origin ADR and SPEC obligations.
features.title: Origin conformance template catalog

features.description: Fail closed when generated origin conformance test files have local edits or incompatible existing rows.
features.title: Origin conformance template conflict guard

features.description: Report planned origin conformance generated files and SSOT rows before mutation.
features.title: Origin conformance template dry-run

features.description: Ensure repeated origin conformance test generation does not churn unchanged files or rows.
features.title: Origin conformance template idempotency

features.description: Embed or emit stable metadata linking generated tests to ADR ids, SPEC ids, feature ids, test ids, and template ids.
features.title: Origin conformance template metadata

features.description: Render deterministic downstream test files from selected ssot-origin conformance templates.
features.title: Origin conformance template renderer

features.description: Add origin ownership metadata to feature, test, claim, and evidence rows.
features.title: Assurance entity origin field

features.description: Validate allowed origin values and ownership transitions for assurance entity rows.
features.title: Assurance entity origin validation

features.description: Expose origin selection and filtering on feature, test, claim, and evidence CLI surfaces where supported.
features.title: Assurance origin CLI flags

features.description: Prevent downstream repo-local repositories from creating or mutating ssot-core feature, test, claim, or evidence rows.
features.title: Downstream ssot-core assurance row ban

features.description: Allow downstream repositories to synchronize ssot-origin assurance rows as governed shared compliance obligations.
features.title: Downstream ssot-origin assurance row sync

features.description: Define locally authored feature, test, claim, and evidence rows as repo-local assurance rows.
features.title: Repo-local assurance rows

profiles.description: Reusable profile for ssot-origin conformance template rendering, downstream scaffold generation, ADR/SPEC compliance tests, execution metadata, evidence output, and reporting.
profiles.title: ssot-origin conformance generation
